title: Convergence scorecard
description: The per-iteration record the refine-to-rubric loop emits, plus the loop-level run envelope. A scorecard carries ONLY derived labels (numeric scores, fixed-vocabulary finding severities, dimension ids, booleans) — NEVER a raw artifact echo or raw model prose. terminate() consumes the scorecard history and emits a deterministic verdict; the engine NEVER claims 'perfect'.

iterations.description: One scorecard per loop iteration, in order (iteration 0 = the initial artifact).

config.description: The deterministic stop-policy knobs. All defaults live in converge.py; a scorecard records the effective values so a verdict is reproducible.

iteration_cap.description: Hard cap on iterations (default ~6). HARD stop.

model_call_budget.description: Hard cap on cumulative model calls across the run (default ~12). HARD stop.

score_floor.description: Minimum weighted score [0,1] required to declare rubric-pass. Below floor at plateau escalates to human.

epsilon.description: Plateau threshold: if |score - previous_best| < epsilon for the configured patience, the loop has plateaued.

plateau_patience.description: Number of consecutive sub-epsilon iterations that constitutes a plateau.

score.description: The weighted_score() over verified dimensions for this iteration, in [0,1].

scores.description: Per-dimension raw scores in [0,1], keyed by dimension id. Derived/unverified dims may appear but are excluded from the weighted score.

findings.description: Findings for this iteration. Severity vocabulary is fixed; a finding carries a dimension id + severity, never raw model prose as the authoritative field.

hard_gates.description: Objective hard-gate results keyed by dimension id. true = green (passed), false = red (failed/blocking). Evaluated BEFORE any model judge.

model_calls.description: Model calls consumed by THIS iteration (judge + refine). 0 when the objective gates short-circuited to refine.

severity.description: Fixed severity vocabulary (borrowed from the FORGE P0/P1 rubric). 'critical' and 'high' are the NEW-finding tripwire for terminate().

note.description: Optional short derived label. NOT authoritative; never a raw artifact echo.

best_index.description: The argmax iteration index emitted (keep-best) — never blindly the last.

reason.description: Deterministic, fixed-vocabulary reason string for the stop.

residual_gaps.description: Honest list of dimensions not fully satisfied at the best iteration, plus every unverified derived dimension. The Last-Mile list — the engine reports what it did NOT achieve.

escalate_to_human.description: True when the loop plateaued below the score floor (cannot reach the bar) — surfaced for human judgement rather than over-claimed.
